get.summary: Search for a user by email or username
get.description:
Search for a user by exact email or username.
Returns their profile and risk score, so an admin can view details before sending an invite.

post.summary: Mock KYC verification and Wallet Creation
post.description:
Step 2 of Onboarding: Verifies the user's BVN (mock) and generates 
their Personal Reserved Account on Monnify.
Updates the user's kyc_status and has_wallet flags.

get.description:
Returns the authenticated user's full profile including:
- Wallet balance
- Personal reserved account (for topping up wallet)
- Payout bank details
- Whether a transaction PIN is set

post.summary: Step 1: Request OTP to change payout bank
post.description:
Sends a 6-digit OTP to the user's registered email.
Required before updating the payout bank account.

OTP is used (not PIN) because the payout bank determines where real money
eventually lands — a high-consequence action requiring independent channel proof.

post.summary: Step 2: Set and validate payout bank account (OTP required)
post.description:
Verifies the OTP, calls Monnify Name Enquiry to validate the account,
then saves the resolved account details.

The user sees the resolved account name (e.g. 'CHIDI OKAFOR') before
this endpoint is called — the frontend should run a Name Enquiry preview
first via GET /users/banks/validate, then submit with the OTP to confirm.

get.description:
Calls Monnify Name Enquiry to resolve the account name.
The frontend calls this *before* submitting the OTP to confirm.

Returns Monnify's full list of banks for the bank picker UI.
No authentication required.

post.summary: Withdraw from wallet to payout bank
post.description:
Withdraw money from the personal wallet to the user's validated external payout bank.
Requires the user's Transaction PIN.

get.description: Get all groups the current user is a member of, along with their role and group details.

post.description: Join a group using a shareable invite code.

Register a new AjoPay user.
- Creates user record in DB.
- Calls Monnify to generate a Personal Reserved Account (Personal Wallet).
- Sends welcome email via Brevo.
- Returns a JWT access token.
Authenticate an existing user and return a JWT access token.

post.summary: Set your 4-digit transaction PIN (first time only)
post.description:
Set the user's 4-digit transaction PIN.
Required to authorize: wallet-to-group transfers, swap acceptance, delegation.
Can only be set once. Use /auth/request-pin-reset to change it.

post.summary: Request a PIN reset OTP (sends to registered email)
post.description:
Step 1 of PIN reset. Sends a 6-digit OTP to the user's registered email.
OTP is used here (not PIN) because you need an independent identity check
when the PIN itself has been forgotten.

post.summary: Reset PIN using OTP from email
post.description:
Step 2 of PIN reset. Verifies the OTP then sets the new PIN.
OTP expires after 10 minutes and can only be used once.

Manually trigger the payout scheduler for testing/demo purposes.
Only available to the platform admin (we assume first user or any user for demo).

MockKycRequest.title: MockKycRequest
MockKycRequest.description:
Request payload for the mock KYC and wallet creation step.
BVN is only used to simulate the KYC check (we don't store it).

SetPayoutBankRequest.title: SetPayoutBankRequest
SetPayoutBankRequest.description:
OTP-gated payout bank change.
Requires an OTP from /users/me/payout-bank/request-otp to proceed.
